LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR RELIEF PER CCP 473 FROM ORDER GRANTING JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF MAY-16-1994, DENIED PLTF MOTION IS ACTUALLY FOR RECONSIDERATION. HOWEVER,WHETHER FOR RECONSIDERATION OR UNDER CCP 473, PLTF DOES NOT SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF. THE MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS/WAS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL FIVE CAUSES OF ACTION. (PLEASE SEE MINUTE ORDER FOR DETAILS).
